title: DB3 folder link sticks across videos
description:
Manually linking a WinCan .db3 to a PipeShare folder (billable package / job folder) no longer disappears after you leave the first video.

What was wrong: the portal sometimes treated Wasabi’s storage client/job labels as a “different job” from the UI labels, wiped the folder DB3 binding scope, then reloaded bindings under the wrong key. The first video could still look fine via filename auto-match; the next video had no match and looked unassigned.

Who is affected: PipeShare cloud jobs on BASE and SaaS when you assign Folder DB3 (or Link selected .db3) and review multiple videos in the same folder.
changeLog: Keep Wasabi storage scope for folder DB3 bindings when UI client/job labels differ.
Load inspection bindings from both Wasabi and UI scopes and merge them.
Do not wipe a local folder DB3 assignment when the server returns an empty binding map.
Keep video selection (and DB3 context) when switching videos outside the current explorer folder.
Resolve admin-linked DB3 even if the .db3 row is briefly missing from a stale tree cache.
